  • Uses of UnknownClientException in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components

    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components that throw UnknownClientException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    PluginClient.channelQuotaReached()
     
    void
    PluginClient.createChannel(String channel, String authorisedUsers)
    Crée un canal privilégié appartenant à ce client.
    void
    PluginClient.destroyChannel(String channel)
    Détruit un canal privilégié possédé.
    void
    PrivilegedClient.destroyChannel(String channel)
    Détruit un canal privilégié créé par ce client.
    void
    PluginClient.destroyChannelNow(String channel)
    Variante synchrone de PluginClient.destroyChannel(java.lang.String) : la destruction est achevée au retour de la méthode.
    boolean
    PluginClient.hasCreatedChannel(String channel)
     
    void
    PluginClient.modifyAuthorisedUsers(String channel, String authorisedUsers)
    Modifie la regex authorisedUsers d'un canal privilégié possédé.
    void
    PrivilegedClient.modifyAuthorisedUsers(String channel, String authorisedUsers)
    Modifie la liste (regex) des utilisateurs autorisés sur un canal privilégié déjà créé par ce client.
    void
    PluginClient.modifyFilter(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Remplace le filtre actif sur channel par filter.
    void
    PluginClient.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Demande au broker un changement de classe de service (upgrade ou downgrade vers FREE).
    void
    PluginClient.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie message sur channel (livraison asynchrone).
    void
    PluginClient.subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Souscrit ce client au canal channel avec le filtre filter (qui peut être null pour « accepter tout »).
    void
    PluginClient.unregister()
    Désenregistre ce client (libère ses canaux privilégiés et ses souscriptions côté broker).
    void
    PublisherClient.unregister()
    Désenregistre le client auprès du broker.
    void
    SubscriberClient.unregister()
    Désenregistre le client auprès du broker.
    void
    PluginClient.unsubscribe(String channel)
    Désabonne ce client du canal channel.

    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins that throw UnknownClientException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    ClientPublicationI.channelAuthorised(String channel)
    return true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.
    boolean
    ClientPublicationPlugin.channelAuthorised(String channel)
    return true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.
    boolean
    ClientSubscriptionI.channelAuthorised(String channel)
    return true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.
    boolean
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.channelAuthorised(String channel)
    return true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.
    boolean
    ClientPrivilegedI.channelQuotaReached()
    return true if the component has reached its channel quota.
    boolean
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.channelQuotaReached()
     
    void
    ClientPrivilegedI.createChannel(String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    create a new channel of the given name with a set of users authorised to use it.
    void
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.createChannel(String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    Crée un canal privilégié (cf.
    void
    ClientPrivilegedI.destroyChannel(String channel)
    destroy the given channel when no more messages are currently waiting to be transmitted.
    void
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.destroyChannel(String channel)
    Détruit un canal privilégié dont ce client est le créateur, en laissant le broker terminer proprement les livraisons en cours.
    void
    ClientPrivilegedI.destroyChannelNow(String channel)
    destroy the given channel immediately, even if the channel has still messages to be transmitted..
    void
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.destroyChannelNow(String channel)
    Variante immédiate de ClientPrivilegedPlugin.destroyChannel(String) : pas de drain des messages en cours.
    Future<MessageI>
    ClientSubscriptionI.getNextMessage(String channel)
    get a future on the next message received from channel.
    boolean
    ClientPrivilegedI.hasCreatedChannel(String channel)
    return true if the component has created channel.
    boolean
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.hasCreatedChannel(String channel)
     
    void
    ClientPrivilegedI.modifyAuthorisedUsers(String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    modify the users authorised to use channel.
    void
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.modifyAuthorisedUsers(String channel, String autorisedUsers)
    Modifie le motif regex des utilisateurs autorisés sur un canal dont ce client est le créateur.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionI.modifyFilter(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    modify the filter associated to the subscription of this component to channel.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.modifyFilter(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Remplace le filtre associé à la souscription courante de ce client sur channel.
    void
    ClientRegistrationI.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    upgrade or degrade the registration to the class rc, returning a new URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.
    void
    ClientRegistrationPlugin.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Modifie la classe de service du client côté broker.
    void
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie un message via le port privilégié (utile pour les classes de service qui n'installent pas le greffon de publication).
    void
    ClientPrivilegedPlugin.publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    Variante batch de ClientPrivilegedPlugin.publish(String, MessageI), via le port privilégié.
    void
    ClientPublicationI.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    asynchronously publish message on channel.
    void
    ClientPublicationI.publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    asynchronously publish all of the messages on channel.
    void
    ClientPublicationPlugin.publish(String channel, MessageI message)
    Publie message sur channel via le port outbound PublishingCI possédé par ce greffon.
    void
    ClientPublicationPlugin.publish(String channel, ArrayList<MessageI> messages)
    Variante batch de ClientPublicationPlugin.publish(String, MessageI).
    boolean
    ClientRegistrationI.registered(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    return true if the component has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.
    boolean
    ClientRegistrationPlugin.registered(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    return true if the component has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionI.subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    subscribe to channel with filter.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    Souscrit ce client à channel avec le filtre filter.
    boolean
    ClientSubscriptionI.subscribed(String channel)
    return true if this component already subscribed to channel.
    boolean
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.subscribed(String channel)
    return true if this component already subscribed to channel.
    void
    ClientRegistrationI.unregister()
    unregister from the publication/subscription system.
    void
    ClientRegistrationPlugin.unregister()
    Désenregistre le client auprès du broker.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionI.unsubscribe(String channel)
    unsubscribe to channel.
    void
    ClientSubscriptionPlugin.unsubscribe(String channel)
    Retire la souscription de ce client à channel.
    MessageI
    ClientSubscriptionI.waitForNextMessage(String channel)
    wait for the next message received from channel, the caller thread being blocked until such a message is delivered from channel.
    MessageI
    ClientSubscriptionI.waitForNextMessage(String channel, Duration d)
    wait for the next message received from channel, the caller thread being blocked for a maximum duration d, returning null if no message has been received during the next d period of time.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
